text: There’s an energizing pulse here—a confluence of curiosity and innovation. The words "R+D" (Research + Development) and the technological displays evoke a sense of progress, as if I stand at the gateway of human ingenuity. Yet, beneath the surface, I wonder about the limits of our creations and our place alongside intelligent machines. I feel both inspired and slightly uneasy—excited by what’s possible, but contemplative about what it means for us, the creators.
